chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1148 of 2025 CP D 559 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 10. 2. For hearing of CMA No.5911/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.11.2025 Rana Azam ul Hassan, advocate for the petitioners. Barrister Moiz Ahmed, advocate for the respondents No.2 & 3. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the respondent No.5. Under instructions, counsel does not press both the petitions, which are dismissed as withdrawn alongwith all pending applications. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
